messages.content:
# Quarterly Transaction Insights ## Sector Overview - **Commercial Industrial** Avg: $22.5M Median: $26.5M - **Multifamily Housing** Avg: $16.8M Median: $13.5M - **Educational Buildings** Avg: $5.0M Median: $5.0M - **State & Federal Construction** Avg: $11.5M Median: $11.5M ## Transactions by Quarter (2017) Bar chart showing transaction amounts ($M) by quarter for four sectors: - **Commercial Industrial (gray bars)**: Q1-2017: 30, Q2-2017: 23, Q3-2017: 6, Q4-2017: 31 - **Multifamily Housing (orange bars)**: Q1-2017: 15, Q2-2017: 10, Q3-2017: 12, Q4-2017: 30 - **Educational Buildings (blue bars)**: Q1-2017: 3, Q2-2017: 7, Q3-2017: 3, Q4-2017: 7 - **State & Federal Construction (green bars)**: Q1-2017: 4, Q2-2017: 15, Q3-2017: 8, Q4-2017: 19 Legend: 🟣 Transactions by Quarter ## City-Level Transaction Data (2017)
City Year Transactions (Total) Permits Filed Commercial Industrial Multifamily Housing Educational Buildings State & Federal Construction
Chicago 2017 $104M 136 $40.5M $7.7M $9.9M $46.0M
San Francisco 2017 $250M 309 $93.5M $80.6M $14.5M $61.3M
Indianapolis 2017 $135M 128 $18.3M $30.9M $50.2M $35.6M
Austin 2017 $184M 455 $34.8M $44.7M $63.1M $41.4M
Los Angeles 2017 $196M 181 $74.1M $39.8M $25.5M $56.6M
LoopNet™ Loopnet Investment Opportunities Page 27

value.description: The value of the transaction in millions.

period.description: The period in the format Q[1-4]-YYYY (e.g., Q1-2017).

category.description: The category of the transaction (e.g., Multifamily Housing).

transactions.description: Quarterly real estate transcations by property class.

transactionsByCity.description: Total Real estate transcations by city.
